/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/dialogbase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/requestsongdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/loadlyricsdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/textinput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/radiobutton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/drawfuncs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/plotwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MKT.dir/main.cpp.o -o MKT  /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.3.0.1 /usr/lib/libsfml-window.so.3.0.1 /usr/lib/libsfml-system.so.3.0.1
